initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    hd_demo_sk,
    SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS total_catalog_sales,
    SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS total_web_sales
FROM 
    catalog_sales
    JOIN household_demographics ON catalog_sales.cs_bill_hdemo_sk = household_demographics.hd_demo_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    LEFT JOIN web_sales ON household_demographics.hd_demo_sk = web_sales.ws_bill_hdemo_sk AND catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_year = 2002
GROUP BY 
    hd_demo_sk
ORDER BY 
    hd_demo_sk
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
  household_demographics.hd_demo_sk,
  SUM(catalog_sales.cs_ext_sales_price) AS total_catalog_sales,
  SUM(web_sales.ws_ext_sales_price) AS total_web_sales
FROM 
  catalog_sales
JOIN 
  household_demographics ON catalog_sales.cs_bill_hdemo_sk = household_demographics.hd_demo_sk
JOIN 
  date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
JOIN 
  web_sales ON web_sales.ws_bill_hdemo_sk = household_demographics.hd_demo_sk
JOIN 
  date_dim AS date_dim_web ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim_web.d_date_sk
WHERE 
  date_dim.d_year = 2002
  AND date_dim_web.d_year = 2002
GROUP BY 
  household_demographics.hd_demo_sk
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
  household_demographics.hd_demo_sk,
  SUM(catalog_sales.cs_ext_sales_price) AS total_catalog_sales,
  SUM(web_sales.ws_ext_sales_price) AS total_web_sales
FROM 
  catalog_sales
  JOIN household_demographics ON catalog_sales.cs_bill_hdemo_sk = household_demographics.hd_demo_sk
  JOIN date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  JOIN web_sales ON web_sales.ws_bill_hdemo_sk = household_demographics.hd_demo_sk
  JOIN date_dim web_date_dim ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = web_date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE 
  date_dim.d_year = 2002
  AND web_date_dim.d_year = 2002
GROUP BY 
  household_demographics.hd_demo_sk
ORDER BY 
  household_demographics.hd_demo_sk
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
  hd_demo_sk,
  SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS total_catalog_sales,
  SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS total_web_sales
FROM 
  catalog_sales
  JOIN household_demographics ON catalog_sales.cs_bill_hdemo_sk = household_demographics.hd_demo_sk
  JOIN date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  LEFT JOIN web_sales ON household_demographics.hd_demo_sk = web_sales.ws_bill_hdemo_sk
  AND date_dim.d_date_sk = web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk
WHERE 
  date_dim.d_year = 2002
GROUP BY 
  hd_demo_sk
ORDER BY 
  hd_demo_sk
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    household_demographics.hd_demo_sk,
    SUM(catalog_sales.cs_ext_sales_price) AS total_catalog_sales,
    SUM(web_sales.ws_ext_sales_price) AS total_web_sales
FROM 
    catalog_sales
    JOIN household_demographics ON catalog_sales.cs_bill_hdemo_sk = household_demographics.hd_demo_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    JOIN web_sales ON web_sales.ws_bill_hdemo_sk = household_demographics.hd_demo_sk
    JOIN date_dim AS date_dim_web ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim_web.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_year = 2002
    AND date_dim_web.d_year = 2002
GROUP BY 
    household_demographics.hd_demo_sk
ORDER BY 
    household_demographics.hd_demo_sk
LIMIT 100

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT 
  hd_demo_sk,
  SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS total_catalog_sales,
  SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS total_web_sales
FROM 
  catalog_sales
  JOIN household_demographics ON catalog_sales.cs_bill_hdemo_sk = household_demographics.hd_demo_sk
  JOIN date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
  LEFT JOIN web_sales ON household_demographics.hd_demo_sk = web_sales.ws_bill_hdemo_sk
  AND date_dim.d_date_sk = web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk
WHERE 
  date_dim.d_year = 2002
GROUP BY 
  hd_demo_sk
ORDER BY 
  hd_demo_sk
LIMIT 100

candidates.sql:
WITH catalog_sales_2002 AS (
    SELECT 
        cs_bill_hdemo_sk,
        SUM(cs_ext_sales_price) AS total_catalog_sales
    FROM 
        catalog_sales
        JOIN date_dim ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    WHERE 
        date_dim.d_year = 2002
    GROUP BY 
        cs_bill_hdemo_sk
),
web_sales_2002 AS (
    SELECT 
        ws_bill_hdemo_sk,
        SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS total_web_sales
    FROM 
        web_sales
        JOIN date_dim ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    WHERE 
        date_dim.d_year = 2002
    GROUP BY 
        ws_bill_hdemo_sk
)
SELECT 
    COALESCE(c.cs_bill_hdemo_sk, w.ws_bill_hdemo_sk) AS hd_demo_sk,
    COALESCE(c.total_catalog_sales, 0) AS total_catalog_sales,
    COALESCE(w.total_web_sales, 0) AS total_web_sales
FROM 
    catalog_sales_2002 c
    FULL OUTER JOIN web_sales_2002 w ON c.cs_bill_hdemo_sk = w.ws_bill_hdemo_sk
ORDER BY 
    hd_demo_sk
LIMIT 100
